reviews_list.review_title: Best knowledge, experience, exposure and campus life.

review_content.Placements: We have so many placements so that in our campus everyone can get a job with a package of 1.8 lac per annum. So far only 3 batch passed out from the college. It has very good placements. Most of the students placed in MNC company such as Cipla, Glenmark, MicroLabs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and it has library in which we can get a lot of books. The campus provides healthy ecosystem to learn and develop skills of choice during the course. The classrooms are spacious and well air conditioned. Also there is auditorium for college events.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with placements in 2018.

review_content.Placements: Almost 40% of the students got placed from recruitment in college in companies situated in Goa and Pune. The salary package offered is 2.1 LPA if you got selected firstly, and then it can be increased based on your work. Lupin, Cipla and topmost industries are recruiting students in their industry. Almost 30% of the students got recruitment in companies situated in Pune, and they got placed further in different companies on a contract basis. D.Pharma students also got selected in those companies. Roles offered are production manager and supervising the production of medications in the industry. Other roles are also offered in our course like employees overall work, quality control manager and quality control of products, which you produce by different techniques and tests provided by drug authority.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Around 60% of the students get placement in big companies. The lowest will be 2.5LPA and the highest will be 3LPA. Too recruiting companies are Cipla, Glenmark, and Lupin. After passing out you get the role of either a fresher or apprentice. About 50 percent of students got the internship.
content.Infrastructure: We have all kinds of facilities which are available with the college like Wi-Fi in every department, College has full equipped labs. The classroom has a projector and the library has everything you need to study for that course. Hostel food quality is good and the hostel gives hot water for bath in the morning.

individual_reviews.title: Best knowledge, experience, exposure and campus life.

content.Placements: We have so many placements so that in our campus everyone can get a job with a package of 1.8 lac per annum. So far only 3 batch passed out from the college. It has very good placements. Most of the students placed in MNC company such as Cipla, Glenmark, MicroLabs.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and it has library in which we can get a lot of books. The campus provides healthy ecosystem to learn and develop skills of choice during the course. The classrooms are spacious and well air conditioned. Also there is auditorium for college events.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with placements in 2018.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of the students got placed from recruitment in college in companies situated in Goa and Pune. Almost 30% of the students got recruitment in companies situated in Pune, and they got placed further in different companies on a contract basis. Other roles are also offered in our course like employees overall work, quality control manager and quality control of products, which you produce by different techniques and tests provided by drug authority.

Yashwantrao Bhonsale College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityD.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to applyB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council.
The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State.
Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible.
Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero sco

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides great learning experience in Ayurveda.

review_content.Placements: There are 75 students in our batch. Many students got internships for 6 months in any civil hospital in Haryana. The stipend offered is Rs 10,000 per month. Few students also opted for higher studies. The stipend for MD varies from college to college depending on AIAPGET rank. Around 50% of students got placed in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are not air-conditioned. There is a smart board in each classroom. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a separate practical laboratory for each department. Pathology laboratory, anatomy laboratory, etc., are also available. There is a decent library in this college. Hospital is available with a good number of patients every day. It provides good opportunities for students to practice and become a good doctor. Our campus has greenery all around. There is a mini market that provides every essential thing for students. There are 5-6 food courts on our campus. Triple occupancy rooms are available. There is a television hall on our campus. A sports room is also available in the hostel. There is a beautiful garden in the hostel. Washrooms are not good. The food served in the mess is not good. Medical facilities are available. Canteen is also available.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in terms of education.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides 100 government job vacancies every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is not much well-built and does not have many facilities. Our college has labs. They are not well-maintained. Classrooms are not air-conditioned. The library has sufficient books. Our college building is old and is under construction.
review_content.Faculty: Some faculty members are good. Some faculty members won't conduct many classes. The course curriculum is very good. Exams are held earlier and students in the final year get enough time to prepare for the post-graduation entrance exam, which is AIAPGET.

reviews_list.review_title: I was absolutely satisfied with teaching staff and administration.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placements. Placements were dependent on students' talents and knowledge. The average salary offered was Rs.60000 per month and the minimum salary offered was Rs.40000 per month after the completion of BAMS. If you go for your setup, it's up to your business behavior and how much you earn. The highest salary package offered depends on your skills and personality. The top recruiter was Himalayan. The top role offered was Ayurvedacharya.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not available in our college. Labs were not well-equipped and classrooms were also not well maintained. The library had hundreds of books related to Ayurveda. In the hostel, there were no facilities available. There was no power backup. It was a rural area full of compromises.

Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

college_info.college_name: Trinity College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Trinity College of Pharmacy:

reviews_list.review_title: Trinity, the best college in Pune.

review_content.Placements: 67+ percent of students are placed. The highest package is 3 Lacs and the lowest is 50,000. Ranbaxy Laboratories, Lupin, and Sun Pharmaceuticals are some of the companies. Classrooms, libraries, and much more infrastructure are available. Labs are clean, with the best surroundings in nature, and there is no rush here. The college is nearby top teachers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, there is a hostel available. In the hostel, we have Wi-Fi connection and separate rooms. Each room has only 3 students, with an attached bathroom, hot and cold water facilities, RO water, washing machines, and fully equipped rooms with cameras. No bullying occurs in the college or hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is the best, but there is a problem in the placement cell.

review_content.Placements: Only 2-3 students are placed. The highest package is 2.5 lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies are marketing and local companies located nearby. Very few got internships through the college. Top roles are medical representative and others like research trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college is good. It provides the hostel, swimming pool, a big ground, and the college has a good library with all the books regarding the course. The college also has smart classrooms and very good labs that contain instruments and chemicals needed for practicals.

reviews_list.review_title: Trinity College of Pharmacy, under KJ Institute, has good placement and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Our college has good opportunities where you can learn and gain a lot of knowledge. Our college provides training too; at least 50% of our students got internships. It's developing; it will take time, but it will be well known for drives. The top roles are medical pharmacist and industrial pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, libraries, and labs are clean, and books are readily available. The hostel has good facilities; the canteen's medical facilities are good, and sports and games are conducted too. Wi-Fi is provided, and if hostel life is good, it will create good bonding.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, and I would recommend joining this college.

review_content.Placements: The salary offered is Rs. 49,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Lupin, etc. Our college provides placement training.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is spacious. Our college has been established in 2019. Our college has well-maintained labs and classrooms. All classrooms have projectors and lights. our college is very hygienic. Our college provides a hostel facility.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They always solve our doubts. Semester exams are moderate. Students should study well to pass exams. We have two sessional exams, which are moderate.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is around INR 60 LPA, and every student can make an INR 6 lacs/annum package if they are selected. Our top recruiting company is Dr. Lal Path Labs. In this company, every student can easily make around INR 50 to 60 lacs per annum if they give 100 percent attention to this laboratory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good; we are all happy, and the canteen at this college is also good; they have every item at a suitable price. The hostel is very comfortable, and it is very attractive. They provide hostels with Wi-Fi and delicious food every day.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who are placed in my course is about 30%. The highest package of my course is Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest package is about Rs. 25,000 per month. There are no recruiters for my course in my college. Every student has to do their internships by themselves, no company is provided by the college. The roles offered in my course are X-ray technician, CT technician, and MRI technician. One can do specialty in any of them based on their choice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities that are included in our course are biotech laboratory, air-conditioned, and classrooms. Library has every kind of book available which is useful for students. The rooms in my hostel are good with two beds and a water cooler. The quality of food is above average and we get non-vegetarian food three times a week.

highlights.summary: IILM University, Gurugram admissions 2026 are open for UG and PG courses. Interested candidates can apply for their desired courses by visiting the university's official website. A few more updates are given below:

table.details: Plot No. 69-71, Golf Course Road Sector 53, Gurgaon (Haryana)
Jinan University, Linneaus University, Management Center Innsbruck, Université du Québec a Montréal, etc.

college_info.intro:
IILM University Gurgaon offers a wide variety of courses at the Gurgaon campus. The programmes are offered through its four different schools. The students are not only offered quality education but are also offered different national and international skills and knowledge to perform well in the industry. The flagship programme offered at the university is the MBA programme. i.e. offered through the School of Management.
IILM Gurgaon offers 12 different MBA programmes that include one general MBA and 11 MBAs with different specialisation. Opting for specialisation helps students to choose from vast career opportunities. Students can also pursue a PGDM programme, i.e. also offered at the university. Both PGDM and MBA are equivalent programme and offer similar knowledge and experience to the students. Candidates who want to pursue the programme must have a valid score in CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ ATMA/ CUET-PG.
IILM Gurgaon offers an MBA programme in Data Science in collaboration with IBM. Students can also choose different specialisations such as Entrepreneurship, Financial Technology, Human Resource Management, Marketing and Innovation, Manufacturing Management, Artificial Intelligence, and Management Technology offers further sub-specialisations like AI, Data Science, and Web 3.0. Students can also select a general MBA or PGDM programme. PGDM programme is also offered with a specialisation in Entrepreneurship and Family Business.
For more information about IILM University Gurgaon check out the video below:

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent in the college. Many companies come to the college for hiring. They provide decent packages. The college helps students to find internships in every aspect. The average package is 6 LPA The college is very supportive during placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The campus contains a library, cafe, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. The college also consists of computer labs and one lab is full of iMacs only.

reviews_list.review_title: Life-changing track having high hope but should have hope would be very low.

review_content.Placements: They have not shown any interest in giving the placement, as I am in semester 6 and have not been told about what companies are coming, how to prepare for interviews in future life, or about personal assistance for placement. I talked to senior-year students, and they told me that a few companies come for BBA students.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have many classrooms, but each year many students take admission, and they are not able to manage it. As a result, students have to suffer. In between, we have an extra one to one and a half hour break, and either the classroom is not available or the faculty is busy with some other subject. They provide Wi-Fi, but you can connect with only one device, either a laptop or a phone.

The fees of MBA programme ranges between INR 9 lakh and INR 11.7 lakh. The university offers 12 different MBA programmes with 11 specialisations and sub-specialisations. Candidates who have a graduation degree with minimum of 50% and a valid score in any one of the CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT and XAT, among others.

The total fee for BBA is a sum of various one-time and annual components. Aspirants once selected need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

review_summary.college_name: IILM University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and value for money.

content.Placements: Students in IILM are groomed well, as their placement criteria is also good. The minimum package is 2.5 LPA and the highest package is 56 LPA. Many top companies visit the college. Internships start from 1st year. B.Tech, BBA, and many courses are available here. It is the best for law students.
content.Infrastructure: College is in the developing stage as more infrastructure buildings are made. It has good classrooms and 2-3 libraries to study. It has 3 cafes. Medical facilities are also good. There is an advantage for girls as girls hostel is on the college campus. Students and campus are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Faculty members are highly educated with prior experience.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 90% in our college. IILM invites companies like Deloitte, Google, etc. Top companies are on campus. The top roles offered in the course are Financial Planning, HR Recruiter, Marketing Manager, and Business Analyst. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is awesome, and the campus focuses on greenery. The food quality is like that in marriages. The sports played are basketball and cricket in the ground itself. The campus has 3 libraries, huge classrooms with AC, and full-time Wi-Fi connection. The campus has huge security.

individual_reviews.title: Review of IILM University, Gurgaon.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in the college. Many companies come to the college for hiring. They provide decent packages. The college helps students to find internships in every aspect. The average package is 6 LPA The college is very supportive during placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The campus contains a library, cafe, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. The college also consists of computer labs and one lab is full of iMacs only.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Life-changing track having high hope but should have hope would be very low.

content.Placements: They have not shown any interest in giving the placement, as I am in semester 6 and have not been told about what companies are coming, how to prepare for interviews in future life, or about personal assistance for placement. I talked to senior-year students, and they told me that a few companies come for BBA students.
content.Infrastructure: They have many classrooms, but each year many students take admission, and they are not able to manage it. As a result, students have to suffer. In between, we have an extra one to one and a half hour break, and either the classroom is not available or the faculty is busy with some other subject. They provide Wi-Fi, but you can connect with only one device, either a laptop or a phone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad placement percentage, less than 50% students are placed.

content.Placements: The college helps students get jobs in good companies. Some students get high-paying jobs in Deloitte, KPMG, EY, but many get average ones and the average package is 5-6 LPA. The college helps students find jobs, but could do more to connect them with top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of both campus and hostel is so-so. There is no in-campus hostel for boys, they have partnered up with a firm called Yourspace. The food was really bad, so we had to raise a complaint to change the food vendors. After some time, the new vendors deteriorated their food quality as well, and only veg food is available. No sports ground, only a basketball court that too is under maintenance. Medical practitioners on the campus take care of what medicine should be given to students.

faqs.answer: IILM BA admissions are done based on marks obtained by applicants in Higher Secondary Examination. The university admission process begins with the Application stage. In this stage, interested students must apply for their preferred course by visiting the official website of the university. Once the application portal is closed, university’s admission committee shortlists students based on their performance in Class 12, extracurricular participation, SOP.The shortlisted applicants are further called for a personal interview at the university. These students must also carry important documents such as education qualification certificates, identity proof, address proof and such for verification purposes. Upon successful verification, students are required to pay the prescribed fees to secure their admission at IILM University.
faqs.question: How to get admission in BA courses at IILM University?

faqs.answer: IILM University has specialisations under its BA course. The aforementioned university has commenced its admission process for BA. There is no info about any deadline/last date for the process. The university has opened the application portal for students to apply. Students can now apply for preferred BA IILM University by visiting the official site of the university. It is imp for every interested student to apply, in order to be considered for further admission process.
faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for BA admissions at IILM University?

faqs.answer: Candidates must complete LLB degree or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD) to apply for LLM programme at IILM University Gurgaon. Aspirants must have documents proving their eligibility for verification.

faqs.question: How to apply for IILM University?

paragraphs: Candidates are offered admission at IILM based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants can appear for entrance test conducted by the university for some courses. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:

Aspirants can apply online or offline, as they prefer. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for any of the UG, PG, or PhD programmes. Candidates must complete the application form and upload the specified documents.

IILM Gurugram shortlists candidates for courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB, BBA LLB based on entrance exam scores.CUET-UGscore is accepted for admission to BA LLB, BBA LLB, and some other UG courses. The university also accepts CUET-PG for MBA, LLM, MA, etc. IILM conducts an admission test for BTech, LLM and other courses. The university also conducts a personal interview round for admission. Aspirants getting admission based on merit have to directly come for the personal interview round.
Once the selection rounds are over, selected aspirants receive the admission offer letter. Such aspirants need to pay theIILM University Gurgaon feesto confirm their admission.

Below is the accepted entrance exam for top courses:Course NameAccepted Entrance ExamBTechCUET/ JEE Main/ IILM EEEBBA (Hons)CUET/ Merit-basedMBACUET-PG/ other entrance examBA LLB (Hons)CLAT/ CUET/ Merit + IILM Admission TestBBA LLB (Hons)CLAT/ CUET/ Merit + IILM Admission TestBDesMerit/ CUET-UGLLMCLAT/ CUET-PG/ Merit + IILM Admission Test

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in IILM University Gurugram?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must first check the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Once registration is done, aspirants must also fulfil the selection criteria. For courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons), entrance exam is required for admission. CLAT is accepted for BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) programmes. CUET-PG and other Management entrance exam is accepted for MBA admission.

faqs.question: Does IILM University Gurgaon require CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, IILM University Gurgaon accepts CUET score for admission to some of the UG courses.Common University Entrance Testalso known asCUET UGis a national level entrance exam conducted by NTA. he exam is conducted once a year in over 500 cities in India and abroad. The exam is conducted in a computer-based mode. CUET exam is conducted in multiple phases depending upon on the number of candidates registered for the entrance exam. Below are the courses accepting CUET-UG score:BA LLB (Hons)BBA LLB (Hons)BBA (Hons)BDesBA (Hons), etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IILM Gurugram?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurugram offers admission to courses either based on merit or entrance exam score. IILM Gurugram selects candidates for courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB, BBA LLB based on entrance exam scores.CUET-UGscore is accepted for admission to BA LLB, BBA LLB, and some other UG courses. The university also accepts CUET-PG scores for MBA, LLM and MA.For other courses, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for admission. The university may also conduct personal interview round for admission to a few programmes.

faqs.question: How much salary can one expect after completing BA from IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University offers various specialisations under its BA programme. These specialisations include Cultural Studies, Global Affairs, Environmental Studies, Media and Communication, and Gender Studies. These courses enable students to make a career across various fields such as Entertainment, News Reporting, Editorial, Content Writing, Psychology and more. The salary of each student differ depending on the respective job profile and respective individual skillset. Following is a list of different job profiles and pay our offered to students of BA: Academic Psychologist-INR 7.7 LPA Content Writer-INR4.1 LPA-INR 5.3 LPA Journalist-INR 3 LPA-INR 5.5 LPA Teacher-INR 4 LPA- INR 6.5 LPA Clinical Social Worker-INR 5 LPA-INR 6.5 LPA

faqs.question: What are the various job profiles students can opt for after completing BA from IILM University?
faqs.answer: IILM University aims to work toward holistic development of its BA students. The university offers various different specialisations namely Cultural Studies, Global Affairs, Environmental Studies, Media and Communication, and Gender Studies for student to choose from. Career prospects may differ from student to student, depending on their chosen specialisation as well as their individual competency. Depending on the respective subjects, BA Graduates can find several job opportunities in government sector, private sector and PSUs. Following graduation, a candidate can work in the government as a Civil Administrator, IAS, Police Officer, or Civil Servant or in the private sector as a Content Writer, Journalist, Human Resource Manager or in a variety of other professions.

videos.title: IILM University Gurgaon BBA Hons Review
IILM University Gurgaon BBA Hons Review
IILM University Gurgaon BBA Hons Review

facilities: It is accessible by road and metro, with the Sector 53–54 Rapid Metro station located at walking distance (barely a 1 min walk!).
The Bus Stand is also at a walking distance (again, barely a minute!)
Both cabs and autos can be found easily via uber, ola etc.
There are also usually a number of autos already situated near the college

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and value for money.
reviews.review_text: College is in the developing stage as more infrastructure buildings are made. It has good classrooms and 2-3 libraries to study. It has 3 cafes. Medical facilities are also good. There is an advantage for girls as girls hostel is on the college campus. Students and campus are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. Faculty members are highly educated with prior experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome, and the campus focuses on greenery. The food quality is like that in marriages. The sports played are basketball and cricket in the ground itself. The campus has 3 libraries, huge classrooms with AC, and full-time Wi-Fi connection. The campus has huge security.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM University, Gurgaon.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The campus contains a library, cafe, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. The college also consists of computer labs and one lab is full of iMacs only.

reviews.review_heading: Life-changing track having high hope but should have hope would be very low.
reviews.review_text: They have many classrooms, but each year many students take admission, and they are not able to manage it. As a result, students have to suffer. In between, we have an extra one to one and a half hour break, and either the classroom is not available or the faculty is busy with some other subject. They provide Wi-Fi, but you can connect with only one device, either a laptop or a phone.

reviews.review_heading: Bad placement percentage, less than 50% students are placed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of both campus and hostel is so-so. There is no in-campus hostel for boys, they have partnered up with a firm called Yourspace. The food was really bad, so we had to raise a complaint to change the food vendors. After some time, the new vendors deteriorated their food quality as well, and only veg food is available. No sports ground, only a basketball court that too is under maintenance. Medical practitioners on the campus take care of what medicine should be given to students...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the bad faculty.
reviews.review_text: Really bad infrastructure. Hostellers need to pay for their electricity charges and the charges per unit are a whopping 12 rupees per unit AND an additional 10 rupees per day for maintenance. I mean, this is just nonsense. The college campus doesn't even have a ground, to be honest; no sports facilities; the faculty is bad; they target individuals for no apparent reason.

reviews.review_heading: If you're here for placement, then the opportunities are decent—not really high packages.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides us with wifi facilities with good conditions. The classroom and library are quite small but it contain all the types of journal and books and they have two libraries and 3 cafeterias. They have in and out campus hostels for MBA 1st year; they have our campus hostel and they are providing transportation facilities to us. Apart from hostel and campus, they have a good number of clubs on campus. The clubs are conducting activities once a week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM University .
reviews.review_text: The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very tasty, and proper hygiene standards are maintained. Good facilities for sports and games are provided by the college. When it comes to security, college is very strict; no one is allowed to enter the campus without permission.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Free Wi-Fi and medical facilities are available for students and staff. Their is strictness on the campus; no one is allowed to enter; you have to show your ID card before entering. Hygiene standards are maintained. Food is good in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of IILM MBA .
reviews.review_text: The girl’s hostel is well-equipped with all necessary amenities. The infrastructure of the college and hostel is amazing: fully air-conditioned, very well-ventilated, with free Wi-Fi and free medical facilities in case of emergency. Food in the college canteen is pocket-friendly, and for just 88 rupees, we get a veg thali.

reviews.review_heading: All insights about IILM MBA.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is full of greenery. The college has basketball and volleyball courts for playing and a separate Zumba/aerobics room as well. The infrastructure of the hostel is also good, and there is a separate bathroom in each room; the rooms are triple sharing. The food is tasty and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IILM MBA.
reviews.review_text: The mess and canteen are good, with a variety of food available at a cheap price. Hygiene is maintained all over campus, whether it’s classrooms, the library, or washrooms. Sports facilities are limited; the rest is all good. Yes, free Wi-Fi facility is provided, and the medical facility is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review titles-  IILM MBA INSIGHTS .
reviews.review_text: The college has three cafeterias, and all the cafeterias are beautiful, with each carrying a different vibe. The food is tasty, and a variety of food is available at an affordable price. Classrooms and the library are good and spacious. Free Wi-Fi facility is provided by the college, and the medical facility is also provided by the college in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Place where true learning resides.
reviews.review_text: The college sports ground is small and has only a volleyball and basketball court, but the classrooms are very nice, huge, and air-conditioned. The college library is also good, with a special reading and self-study area. Free Wi-Fi and medical facilities are provided by the college, and each student is required to have medical insurance; otherwise, the college provides it.

reviews.review_heading: IILM MBA teaching reviews.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university are appreciable and satisfying. Self-studying rooms are attached to the university library, where students can go and study in their free time. There are a total of three cafeterias at the university, with a variety of food available.

college_info.college_name: IILM University

data.description: IILM University Gurgaon campus is spread over 7 acres. The campus offers modern yet all-required facilities for the students. It has well-furnished classrooms, labs, a library facility, indoor-outdoor spots facility, a gym, and many more facilities for the overall development of the students. Located near metro it becomes easily connected with public transport which is affordable and safe for the students to commute.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IILM University

likes.text: Companies like ICICI Bank, Loreal, KPMG, Deloitte visit campus for placements.
The college also puts its best effort into ensuring students get well-paid internships.

likes.text: Extraordinary placement facilities are provided to us with modern and digital classrooms, AC-enabled computer labs, free Wi-Fi, a library, and various sports grounds.
The quality of the facilities available in hostels is very good, and the quality of food served in the mess and canteen is also good.

likes.text: Yes, the teachers are very helpful, highly qualified and knowledgeable, and the quality of their teaching is also very good.
The course curriculum is quite relevant and it makes students industry-ready by organizing various student-engaging programs.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied because of its factors and supporting staffs are there.

review_content.Placements: This college is not good, and I would not recommend students to take admission in it. Being a pharmacy student, I am placed at Byjus sales. Around 5 students are placed out of 103 students, and the average salary package offered is 1.2 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students will only be able to eat food once or twice a week. The infrastructure is average, and extra activities are not provided. Wi-Fi is enabled, and in the classrooms, students will not be able to attend class during the summer. There is no financial support. Games and sports are not available.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good and value for money.

review_content.Placements: More than 65% of students are placed on the campus interview. The placements cell are very helpful. They help the students in exploring placements opportunities by inviting many companies. Many job opportunities are there in the field of health care centers, pharmaceutical companies, chemist shops, etc. Companies like Dabur, Glenmark, and Aristo pharmaceutical companies come to our college for campus interviews. The minimum salary package offered is 3 LPA. The maximum salary package offered is 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is a colossal monument extended over an area of 17 acres, depicting a rare blend of modern and ancient architecture creating an ideal environment for academic excellence. The administrative block is in the forefront and has a magnificent workshop at its rear, the side wings boast of teaching blocks comprising lecture theatres, seminar, and conference halls. A huge auditorium and an enriched central library with modern audio-visual, multimedia, and digital learning tools, besides a vast number of books, at the center, give an aesthetic luster to its scrupulously designed layout.

review_summary.college_name: Oriental College of Pharmacy, Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The best college in Bhopal with good facilities.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are good, with an average package of 4 to 5 LPA. Many companies are coming into college placement cells, like Sun Pharma, Mankind, Tata, Cognizant, and others, visit the campus for pool placements. Many students are placed in Tata Consultancy Services with a good minimum package of 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. The facilities are nice and the campus is good. The sports facilities are available. Here, many students are selected for sports and NCC. Very strict rules are followed by the teachers and students, and all are very helpful on our college campus.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has good study environment.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Teachers are very supportive throughout the entire recruitment process and help us at every stage.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing with very much greenery, very pure, and good campus environment. Campus is very helpful and supportive.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very knowledgeable and hold Ph.D. degrees. They have amazing knowledge about everything including course subjects and practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of its factors and supporting staffs are there.

content.Placements: This college is not good, and I would not recommend students to take admission in it. Being a pharmacy student, I am placed at Byjus sales. Around 5 students are placed out of 103 students, and the average salary package offered is 1.2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Students will only be able to eat food once or twice a week. The infrastructure is average, and extra activities are not provided. Wi-Fi is enabled, and in the classrooms, students will not be able to attend class during the summer. There is no financial support. Games and sports are not available.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good and value for money.

content.Placements: More than 65% of students are placed on the campus interview. The placements cell are very helpful. They help the students in exploring placements opportunities by inviting many companies. Many job opportunities are there in the field of health care centers, pharmaceutical companies, chemist shops, etc. Companies like Dabur, Glenmark, and Aristo pharmaceutical companies come to our college for campus interviews. The minimum salary package offered is 3 LPA. The maximum salary package offered is 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is a colossal monument extended over an area of 17 acres, depicting a rare blend of modern and ancient architecture creating an ideal environment for academic excellence. The administrative block is in the forefront and has a magnificent workshop at its rear, the side wings boast of teaching blocks comprising lecture theatres, seminar, and conference halls. A huge auditorium and an enriched central library with modern audio-visual, multimedia, and digital learning tools, besides a vast number of books, at the center, give an aesthetic luster to its scrupulously designed layout.

individual_reviews.title: This is best college for pharmacy in Bhopal (after VNS).

content.Placements: 50-60% gets placement and other also get a job off-campus. The average package is approximately 350000, and the lowest about 250000. There are many companies that visit the college for campus placement like Lupin, sun pharma, Cipla, Glenmark, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very good faculty. They are always available for students. The library is not big but the environment of the library is very good. The room of the hostel is good but the food is not good. The canteen is available in campus. They sell food of good quality.

college_info.college_name: Sardar Patel College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Sardar Patel College of Pharmacy admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 62 students were admitted at Sardar Patel College of Pharmacy and 27 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 27 students 20 were placed with median salary of INR 144000 and 7 students opted for higher studies. A total of 61 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Sardar Patel College of Pharmacyand 50 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 50 students 14 were placed with median salary of INR 180000 and 18 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sardar Patel College of Pharmacy is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma, B.Voc and D.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma. The fee structure for the Sardar Patel College of Pharmacy programmes is around INR 2,53,200.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not totally satisfied with my college. Placements of students is not good.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of the students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 1.96 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruitment companies are MacLeod Pharmaceuticals and Troika Pharma. About 20% of the students got selected for internships. The placement of students is held according to their interview numbers. Students who are selected for internships got joining letters.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not for students. Labs were good. Classrooms and labs are average. Hostel only for female students. Canteen facilities are present on the college campus. Medical facilities are also present in the college campus. Classrooms are not well stabilized.

reviews_list.review_title: Sardar Patel College of Pharmacy is better in Gorakhpur.

review_content.Placements: To take admission in this course, one should have 55% marks in 12th. The maximum package of this course is 10th to 15th lac per year and the lowest package is 3 to 5th lac per year, with an average of 5th to 10th lac. Top recruiting companies for this course include Cipla and Paracetamol, etc. The percentage of students who got internships is approximately 45%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in this college are good, but the teachers keep changing all the time. This college provides everything such as good classrooms and libraries. Facilities in the hostel are good, and this college only provides a girls' hostel. Food quality is good both in taste in the canteen and in the hostel.

college_info.college_name: The Lotus College of Optometry: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding The Lotus College of Optometry Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.review_title: One of the best college for Optometry!

review_content.Placements: So, from a batch of 40 students, 2 students are struggling for placement, rest of us are working in very decent places. For Optometrist, the major work areas are tertiary Eye hospitals, Clinics, retail optical outlets and MNCs. So being freshers, all of us have got package ranging 3 to 5 Lacs PA.
review_content.Infrastructure: I would say my institute has all the facilities one is looking for in optometry college, especially in Mumbai I'll say it is the best. Apart from great faculty members, college is full of basic facilities like Wi-Fi library all the optics and optometry related instruments.

reviews_list.review_title: The campus life is good and a straight way to our aim.

review_content.Placements: The college offers good placements to students, and there are many branches under this. For an optometrist, the initial salary package was above Rs. 30,000 per month. Optometrists are the assistants of the ophthalmologist as the primary checkups are done by optometrists and then referred to the doctor. All the students of our college have to do internships. The stipend offered during the internship was up to Rs. 10,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a library, labs, canteen, hostel facilities, etc. There are labs with eye testing machines. Machines like slit lamp, keratometer, lensometer, vision taking, contact lens fitting, etc., are available in the labs. The canteen provides rich food to students. Hostel facilities are good, safe, secure, and comfortable. Dormitories and rooms are available in the college.

review_summary.college_name: The Lotus College of Optometry Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, and it is a must consideration for students.

content.Placements: For placement, our college is one of the best in India. With a wide range of brands, there is a high chance of getting placed in companies you desire. Our college offers two courses like a bachelor in optometry for 3 years with a 1-year internship and a masters in optometry for 2 years.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and a library are available. There is no separate hostel, so you have to manage accommodation on your own. For food, there is a hospital canteen, which provides average food. As it is a hospital, medical facilities are bound to be good.

individual_reviews.title: One of the best college for Optometry!

content.Placements: So, from a batch of 40 students, 2 students are struggling for placement, rest of us are working in very decent places. For Optometrist, the major work areas are tertiary Eye hospitals, Clinics, retail optical outlets and MNCs. So being freshers, all of us have got package ranging 3 to 5 Lacs PA.
content.Infrastructure: I would say my institute has all the facilities one is looking for in optometry college, especially in Mumbai I'll say it is the best. Apart from great faculty members, college is full of basic facilities like Wi-Fi library all the optics and optometry related instruments.

individual_reviews.title: The campus life is good and a straight way to our aim.

content.Placements: The college offers good placements to students, and there are many branches under this. For an optometrist, the initial salary package was above Rs. 30,000 per month. Optometrists are the assistants of the ophthalmologist as the primary checkups are done by optometrists and then referred to the doctor. All the students of our college have to do internships. The stipend offered during the internship was up to Rs. 10,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a library, labs, canteen, hostel facilities, etc. There are labs with eye testing machines. Machines like slit lamp, keratometer, lensometer, vision taking, contact lens fitting, etc., are available in the labs. The canteen provides rich food to students. Hostel facilities are good, safe, secure, and comfortable. Dormitories and rooms are available in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - MBA in Hospitality and Tourism Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best university.

review_content.Placements: We had to complete all semesters to be eligible for placement. Companies that offered placements included KPMG, Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, and Reliance etc. The average package was quite low, around 3 LPA, while the highest was approximately 6.5 LPA with some perks. I was not sure about the company names or student details. Since I was pursuing CA, I did not look for placements after my degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were 21 hostels, and any one of them could be allotted to a candidate. Hostels were generally equipped with basic facilities and mostly comprised twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel had its own food canteen, where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner were provided daily. There were ample options for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian candidates.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Not actually a great infrastructure, but a vibrant campus life with an industry-relevant curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Hi, I am from the 2024-2028 batch of B.Tech in CSE (AI) at Jagran Lakecity University, Bhopal. Around 70% of the students in my course got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.2 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Infosys, TCS, Accenture, and Deloitte. Around 70% of the students secured internships at IBM, HCL, and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software developer, AI/ML engineer, and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university provides a pretty okay infrastructure. The CSE/AI department has labs, low-speed Wi-Fi, and non-AC classrooms with projectors. The library is in good condition, and it is well stocked with fresh books. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess is hygienic and offers a variety of foods, while the canteen serves fast food and snacks. The university provides 24/7 medical services. For sports lovers, JLU has football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket, along with a gym facility. The university also organizes cultural events, fests, etc.

review_summary.college_name: JLU Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has amazing placements and faculty.

content.Placements: We have amazing placements offered for digital marketing and media positions with MNCs. Almost every student got admitted to good companies, and we are grateful to our faculty and career cell for helping us achieve our own better future. We got amazing packages offered.
content.Infrastructure: Amazing and safe campus with a comfortable environment. It is modern and spacious with attractive built-ins and a library as well. Classes are clean and well settled, with digital learning to be done. The canteen provides good and healthy options for food, prepared neatly.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business and Law - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the university.

content.Placements: I am a student of BBA in aviation and airport management, and I am currently transitioning to my second year (third semester). We are promised 100% placement at the end of our course. They have a 100% placement record from previous batches. My batch is the first for this course in this college and they have assured 100% placement.
content.Infrastructure: All required facilities are provided from lifts to smart classes to cafes and stationery within the college, and free Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The college provides different labs related to respective courses, a large library, and hostel students are satisfied with their facilities. There is a free mess available for hostel students and paid-for day scholars. Jagran is known for sports, events, and games. Basic medical facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - MBA in Hospitality and Tourism Management - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best university.

content.Placements: We had to complete all semesters to be eligible for placement. Companies that offered placements included KPMG, Deloitte, Wipro, TCS, and Reliance etc. The average package was quite low, around 3 LPA, while the highest was approximately 6.5 LPA with some perks. I was not sure about the company names or student details. Since I was pursuing CA, I did not look for placements after my degree.
content.Infrastructure: There were 21 hostels, and any one of them could be allotted to a candidate. Hostels were generally equipped with basic facilities and mostly comprised twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel had its own food canteen, where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner were provided daily. There were ample options for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian candidates.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct 2025) - B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not actually a great infrastructure, but a vibrant campus life with an industry-relevant curriculum.

content.Placements: Hi, I am from the 2024-2028 batch of B.Tech in CSE (AI) at Jagran Lakecity University, Bhopal. Around 70% of the students in my course got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.2 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Infosys, TCS, Accenture, and Deloitte. Around 70% of the students secured internships at IBM, HCL, and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software developer, AI/ML engineer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides a pretty okay infrastructure. The CSE/AI department has labs, low-speed Wi-Fi, and non-AC classrooms with projectors. The library is in good condition, and it is well stocked with fresh books. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess is hygienic and offers a variety of foods, while the canteen serves fast food and snacks. The university provides 24/7 medical services. For sports lovers, JLU has football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket, along with a gym facility. The university also organizes cultural events, fests, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the finest universities.

content.Placements: After the 3rd semester, the campus placements started and before that, we had done internships in good companies. During placements, many reputed companies like TCS, Federal Bank, Axis Bank, etc., visit the college. All students get campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: It has 3 types of hostels/dorms (called IIMA) are there in IIMA. Old dorms, new dorms, and married student hostel. Two messes are serving food to the whole IIMA community. In terms of quality, I would rate it as average, considering the type of food served. It is mandatory to stay in hostels for PGP students.

faqs.answer: Once the application process is completed, JLU Bhopal conducts the JLUET test. Candidates seeking admission via JLUET must appear for the exam on the scheduled date. These students are further evaluated via a personal interview round.
faqs.question: What to do after applying for BA LLB (H) admissions at JLU Bhopal?

faqs.answer: Yes, candidates seeking admission to the JLU Bhopal BA LLB course can take admission without appearing for JLUET. In order to do so, students must have appeared for CLAT and scored a minimum of 50. Those who do not meet the prescribed cutoff must appear for the JLUET exam. Shortlisted students are also required to take part in a PI session after that.

faqs.answer: In order to get admission to the JLU Bhopal BBA programme, candidates must begin with the application stage. Check out the below steps to know the complete application process:1. To start, students must scan, upload, and email the following documents to the university's official email ID. The documents to be attached are:Certified copies of all mark sheets from class 10 onwards till the last completed semester/year.An authentic copy of the semester- or year-wise detailed course structure, scheme of teaching, and evaluation of the course of study pursued by the parent university/institutionNo Objection Certificate from the parent university/institution2. Visit the university's online admission portal.3. Register by providing the required details.4. Log in to the newly made account and fill out the application form.5. Pay the application fees of INR 1,100.6. Preview and submit.

placement_report.college_name: JLU Bhopal Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: JLU Bhopal Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has disclosed 2023 placement data on its official website. The highest package offered during Jagran Lakecity University placements 2023 stood at INR 14.25 LPA . Earlier, the highest package offered during Jagran Lakecity University placements 2021 was INR 15 LPA . According to the NIRF report 2025, 7 LLB, 39 BBA LLB, 6 LLM and 29 MBA students were placed during JLU Bhopal placements 2024. Further, the median package offered to MBA students during JLU Bhopal placements 2024 was INR 6.60 LPA. For Law courses, the median package ranged between INR 2.40 LPA and INR 3 LPA . The top recruiters of JLU Bhopal during the past years included HCL, Airtel, TCS, Infosys, Amazon, Deloitte, Wipro , etc.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Jagran lakecity university?
faqs.answer: The JLU Bhopal placements 2023 concluded with the highest package of INR 14.25 LPA. Earlier, the highest salary offered in 2021 was INR 15 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the JLU Bhopal BDes placements?
faqs.answer: JLU Bhopal has not yet released the placement data for BDes specifically. However, the student reviews present on Shiksha provide the outlook on the placement scenario. As per the reviews, the BDes placements at JLU are good. The average salary package offered to UX designers is INR 8.74 LPA during the recent placement drive. Moreover, some of the top recruiters who have recruited BDes students in the past included Amazon, Flipkart, Reebok, and Adidas .

faqs.question: How are the BA LLB (H) course placements at JLU Bhopal?
faqs.answer: As per the JLU Bhopal 2023 placement data, the the highest package offered to students participating in the placement drive held in 2023 stood at INR 14.25 LPA . Earlier, in 2021, the highest package offered stood at INR 15 LPA . Other than this, as per the JLU Bhopal Law NIRF report, the median package offered to five-year course (BA LLB Hons) students stood at INR 3.9 LPA during the 2022 placement drive.

faqs.question: What is the placement record for MCA at JLU Bhopal?
faqs.answer: JLU Bhopal has not yet released the placement statistics for the MCA programme. However, the overall placement report for 2023 is available. As per the report, the the highest package offered during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 14.25 LPA . Moreover, during the placement drive held in 2021, the highest package offered stood at INR 15 LPA . Other than this, it is known that JLU Bhopal maintains a good network of recruiters. As per official sources, HCL, Airtel, TCS, Infosys, Amazon, Deloitte, Wipro , etc., are some of the top recruiters who have participated in past years placements.

The institute is ranked #134 in the Engineering (Private) category, #114 under B.A., #162 under B.Com., #103 under BCA, and #44 under Law by the India Today 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. outlook.description:
JLU Bhopal has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Engineering (Private)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for JLU Bhopal indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, JLU Bhopal's rank is #83, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'BBA', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JLU Bhopal's rank is #92, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel.description: The university offers comprehensive hostel facilities for boys and girls separately within the campus and outside respectively. JLU has a capacity to accommodate 400+ students which will be increased to 1000 by 2022. The Student Enrichment Hub at Chandanpura has a modern hostel, which has 3 blocks and 14 floors where students can avail single, double or triple occupancy, a/c and non a/c rooms as per their preference. The rooms are fully furnished, properly ventilated and adequately sunlit during the day. The off-campus accommodation of JLU offers double and triple occupancy rooms and can house 70+ students; bus service is available for traveling to and fro campuses.

library.description:
The library is unarguably the most important academic facility of any university. Jagran Lakecity Universityy has gone far and beyond to make sure that its Library is one of a kind, not only in the country but in the whole world. The primary library at JLU Student Enrichment Hub, is a breathtaking iconic 90 feet tall PYRAMID, which is the only functional pyramid used for academic purpose in India. Spread in 28000 sq. ft. the structure houses 35000 books and has a subscription of 30+ monthly and annual journals and magazines. The Pyramid has a quiet reading area for 100 students and also gives access to vast reading resources online. The students and staff at JLU are provided access credentials to ‘McGraw Hill E-Books’ which additionally opens millions of books, journals, research papers, and much more. The Faculty of Law house a separate ‘Mini-Library’ in Block C, which has around 2000 hardcover books, and students of law, are provided access to thousands of legal resources online.

The Library at the main MungaliaChap Campus of JLU houses over 8000 books, magazines, and journals. It also has 25 computer systems that serve the purpose of an E-Library for the learners. The library is at Block A and has a subscription of 8 annual and monthly journals especially from the Engineering and Hospitality sector.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball

cafeteria.description:
Mess: 
The University’s dining hall through its modern kitchen and a seating capacity for 180 people is designed to cater students & staff with hygienically cooked, mouthwatering dishes. The hostilities indulge in nutritious food 4 times a day and the mess will not let you miss your home cooked meal. The best part about the mess at Jagran Lakecity University is that the student committee along with faculty members decides the menu for every semester. So, when students and administrators join hands to improve the food on campus, mess is no longer a monotonous place with boring food.

Food Court:
For the foodies, our campus has a lively eating space, called ‘APPETITE’. It has 5 food outlets where you can indulge yourself in the delightful cuisines from around the globe. Food is an opportunity for a university to define its culture and APPETITE is really that - a melting point for the entire university to come, sit together as one single community and enjoy the food.
But that’s not all, JLU regularly hosts food festivals and events that appeal to every palette and are amazing to socialize and make new friends. Food is nourishment for our bodies and a lot more than that, so we have facilitated the students to take the time to enjoy it.

reviews.review_heading: The college has amazing placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Amazing and safe campus with a comfortable environment. It is modern and spacious with attractive built-ins and a library as well. Classes are clean and well settled, with digital learning to be done. The canteen provides good and healthy options for food, prepared neatly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: All required facilities are provided from lifts to smart classes to cafes and stationery within the college, and free Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The college provides different labs related to respective courses, a large library, and hostel students are satisfied with their facilities. There is a free mess available for hostel students and paid-for day scholars. Jagran is known for sports, events, and games. Basic medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best university.
reviews.review_text: There were 21 hostels, and any one of them could be allotted to a candidate. Hostels were generally equipped with basic facilities and mostly comprised twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel had its own food canteen, where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner were provided daily. There were ample options for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian candidates.

reviews.review_heading: Not actually a great infrastructure, but a vibrant campus life with an industry-relevant curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The university provides a pretty okay infrastructure. The CSE/AI department has labs, low-speed Wi-Fi, and non-AC classrooms with projectors. The library is in good condition, and it is well stocked with fresh books. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess is hygienic and offers a variety of foods, while the canteen serves fast food and snacks. The university provides 24/7 medical services. For sports lovers, JLU has football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, and cricket, along with a gym ...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the finest universities.
reviews.review_text: It has 3 types of hostels/dorms (called IIMA) are there in IIMA. Old dorms, new dorms, and married student hostel. Two messes are serving food to the whole IIMA community. In terms of quality, I would rate it as average, considering the type of food served. It is mandatory to stay in hostels for PGP students.

reviews.review_heading: JLU insiders - A great college.
reviews.review_text: Every class has projectors. The college has Wi-Fi facilities available everywhere. JIO sim doesn't work here; there's no signal for Jio, only Airtel connectivity. Our robotics lab is in a tie-up with a Singapore university, so yes, it's great. I am a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel, but I have heard the mess is great. Medical facilities are available. Sports available are box cricket, basketball, football, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Jagran - A home away from home.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided in our hostel, like buses, Wi-Fi, mess, etc. Facilities are well-equipped with tools, machinery, a computer lab, a library, a canteen, an infirmary, a basketball court, a football ground, etc. The food quality in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: JLU Bhopal: Industry-focused BMS programme with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Jagran Lakecity University (JLU), Bhopal, is renowned for its modern infrastructure and vibrant campus environment, offering an exceptional educational experience. Spread across a lush 230-acre campus, JLU provides state-of-the-art facilities to support academic and extracurricular excellence. The university features contemporary academic blocks with well-equipped classrooms, high-tech computer labs, and a resource-rich library that includes digital and physical collections. It also boasts world...

reviews.review_heading: An awesome college with beautiful infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: You will love the infrastructure very much as they provide air-conditioned classrooms and an auditorium. Our canteens are decent. There is Wi-Fi all over the campus. Hostels are also great with the mess, a gym, sports, games, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Everything perfect here.
reviews.review_text: JLU is Central Asia's No. 1 university, with the best infrastructure, and the center of attraction is the pyramid in the middle of the university. Classrooms are the best, labs are the best, even canteens are the best. Canteen food and hostel food both are perfect in taste. Hostel rooms are nice, and the mess timings are fixed. (When lectures exceed, you can inform the professor and leave for the mess). If we talk about sports, in JLU, if you excel in sports, you are really going to excel in eve...

reviews.review_heading: This college is a great option to choose.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very big and have comfortable seats and tables, and smart boards. The Wi-Fi only works outside the classroom and throughout the campus. The library is huge and has a separate floor for law books. The Wi-Fi is good, the mess food is amazing, and the campus is so green that it feels good to be there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the campus, faculty and internships , really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: In this college all the facilities are available like jlu wifi, in our classroom all the fans are properly working, the seats are too comfortable and are folding ones. The library is so big and all the books are available and very peaceful. People here support sports a lot and conducts tournaments like Infinito and virudika.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is equipped with modern classroom and is well maintained.
reviews.review_text: The university celebrates annual and technical festivals, including the Engineering Day festival in September. These festivals include various artistic performances, workshops, and competitions. The library has an extensive collection of academic books, materials, and journals across various disciplines. Each journal is available as a physical copy and digital research is provided through the university library portal. The university provides classrooms with smart technology, including projector...

reviews.review_heading: JLU - My Dream College?
reviews.review_text: Jagran Lakecity University is famous for its infrastructure, with newly built buildings. There are various labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi available. The quality of food is good and affordable for students. There are different grounds for each type of game.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Jagran Lakecity University
reviews.review_text: The one thing about JLU is its infrastructure; it's really beautiful and lovely. The food quality is also very good. The campus is surrounded by nature and has a fresh environment making it a peaceful place to live with sitting areas and good spots to chill sometimes.

paragraphs: Jagaran Lakecity University has 3 types of scholarships i.e. JLU Scholarships for Academic Excellence, Shri Guru Dev Gupta Median Scholarships & JLU Elite Athlete Program. JLU Elite Athlete offers 100% scholarships on tuition fees, 50% to National Medal winners & 25% on National Participation. Apart from this, the University also gives Chancellor Freeships to 15 students each year across all programmes. The university also has tie-ups with Axis Bank, HDFC Bank & SBI Bank. However, students can avail of loans from any bank.
For MBA students with a GMAT score of 600 or lower than 650, the University gives a 25% discount. The scholarships available for Academic Excellence are shown below:

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college with good teachers, and this college is the 3rd-best in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: BHMS is a 5-year, 6-month course, that requires you to pass the NEET exam to get into a college. To get admission to this college, you must get more than 200 marks in the NEET exam. Our college is Maharashtra's third-best college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good campus. Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Suman Rehabilitation Center helps smokers and alcoholics return to a normal life. The campus has lush greenery. An ambulance service is available. The canteen is good. The quality of food in the mess is good. Students who live off campus can also get meals from the college canteen. Medical facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Probably one of the best college in Maharashtra for BHMS.

review_content.Placements: See Its a BHMS. So there's no such a thing called placements in any BHMS college. But students can practice on their own. But this college offers great academics than any other BHMS college. So if you don't have option other than BHMS then this is one of the best college as per academics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is very poor. Not well developed. No Wi-Fi for students. But practical labs are well developed. And everything you need during practicals is available. We have fresh bodies every year to disect for better knowledge of anatomy and every apparatus needed during physiology practical. There are 5 classrooms and one seminar hall. We've library bit it contains academics books only and some magazines. If you're going to take admission in this college then don't opt for hostel cause it's terrible. Hygeine. Zero. But food is okok. So it's better to go for a PG. !

But this college offers great academics than any other BHMS college. So if you don't have option other than BHMS then this is one of the best college as per academics.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is very poor. Not well developed. No Wi-Fi for students. But practical labs are well developed. And everything you need during practicals is available. We have fresh bodies every year to disect for better knowledge of anatomy and every apparatus needed during physiology practical. There are 5 classrooms and one seminar hall. We've library bit it contains academics books only and some magazines. If you're going to take admission in this college then don't opt for hostel cause it's terrible. Hygeine. Zero. But food is okok. So it's better to go for a PG. !

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth:

faqs.answer: A:    Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 9.30816 LPA to Master of Surgery students.
faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth to Master of Surgery students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as MBBS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MD, MS and Master of Surgery. The fee structure for the Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth programmes is around INR 22,50,000 to 1,33,70,550.

review_content.Placements: Mostly all the students get placed and they earn a good amount of money. We mostly do our internships in college itself because our college has a good flow of patients which helps us to see a wide variety of patients. The average salary package offered for a medical undergraduate is Rs. 40,000 per month and it can vary up to 1 lac per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very good infrastructure. It has all the advanced machines which provide up-to-date learning. We got good labs will all the needed resources. Classrooms are good, but there is no air-conditioning. Food quality in the mess is not up to the standard. But the canteen has good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and is focused on academics, but no campus life or curricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Bharati Vidyapeeth Medical college, being a medical college, does not have on-campus placements, but the degree is recognised worldwide. Passing out from here opens up various job opportunities throughout the country. Packages start from 20,000-70,000 per month, depending upon the hospital you work at.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building is fairly new and well built. All the labs are well-equipped. There is a separate building for the library, which is well lit and spacious. The hospital is well constructed and well maintained. It is clean and hygienic. Bharati maintains the campus well with beautiful lawns and fountains. There are separate hostels for girls and boys with single and double occupancy rooms with attached washrooms and bathrooms. AC is not available, but the weather doesn't require it. Food is as good as a mess can offer. A gym is also available in the hostel, along with table tennis tables. There is a huge ground (not well maintained) for cricket and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it charges high fees.

review_content.Placements: Students in our college have to complete an internship in the hospital. Students don't get any stipend to do an internship, and they have to do duty 365 days compulsorily. They don't get paid well. A common MBBS student gets a salary up to Rs. 85,000 per month in any government hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is beautiful, with a pleasant vibe all around. The hostels are huge and spacious. Single and double accommodation is given based on the choice of the students. Mess food is not up to the mark. The canteen is good and clean. Classrooms are good here, but there is no air-conditioning facility. Wi-Fi facilities are limited, and students get only 34 MB each day.
