review_summary.college_name: Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a good infrastructure with trained staff and affordable charges.

content.Placements: Mostly all the students get placed and they earn a good amount of money. We mostly do our internships in college itself because our college has a good flow of patients which helps us to see a wide variety of patients. The average salary package offered for a medical undergraduate is Rs. 40,000 per month and it can vary up to 1 lac per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very good infrastructure. It has all the advanced machines which provide up-to-date learning. We got good labs will all the needed resources. Classrooms are good, but there is no air-conditioning. Food quality in the mess is not up to the standard. But the canteen has good food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and is focused on academics, but no campus life or curricular activities.

content.Placements: Bharati Vidyapeeth Medical college, being a medical college, does not have on-campus placements, but the degree is recognised worldwide. Passing out from here opens up various job opportunities throughout the country. Packages start from 20,000-70,000 per month, depending upon the hospital you work at.
content.Infrastructure: The building is fairly new and well built. All the labs are well-equipped. There is a separate building for the library, which is well lit and spacious. The hospital is well constructed and well maintained. It is clean and hygienic. Bharati maintains the campus well with beautiful lawns and fountains. There are separate hostels for girls and boys with single and double occupancy rooms with attached washrooms and bathrooms. AC is not available, but the weather doesn't require it. Food is as good as a mess can offer. A gym is also available in the hostel, along with table tennis tables. There is a huge ground (not well maintained) for cricket and football.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it charges high fees.

content.Placements: Students in our college have to complete an internship in the hospital. Students don't get any stipend to do an internship, and they have to do duty 365 days compulsorily. They don't get paid well. A common MBBS student gets a salary up to Rs. 85,000 per month in any government hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is beautiful, with a pleasant vibe all around. The hostels are huge and spacious. Single and double accommodation is given based on the choice of the students. Mess food is not up to the mark. The canteen is good and clean. Classrooms are good here, but there is no air-conditioning facility. Wi-Fi facilities are limited, and students get only 34 MB each day.

individual_reviews.title: A college with peaceful environment

content.Placements: The students getting above 50 %in HS exam are qualified for these course in GIPS Tezpur. The package is 65000 per semester and the admission fees is 73000. The recruitment companies for our post are Dabur ,Sun pharmaceutical , Ajanta pharmaceuticals, Avizen. Almost everyone got chance to do internships in both industry and hospital. Even I did my industrial intern in Phoenix laboratories during 7th semester and after completing i have done hospital internship.
content.Infrastructure: The best part was the library books were available and very silently peacefully we can study. The wifi is available everytime we enter the library and those having 5g phone they get unlimited data in the university. Since i didn't stayed in hostel because my home was near so i didn't know much about hostels facilities.

The canteen is big and a variety of food is available. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are conducted every year. Everything is good. We have a huge campus w...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best pharmaceutical college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has sufficient labs for every batch. Time table is maintained in our college. Lab contains all the required apparatus. We are doing practicals in 4 groups, each group consisting of 5 students and no lack of chemicals. All the required industrial machines for manufacturing tablets or other formulations are available. Classrooms are clean and big. Library has a huge collection of books for every subject. Library contains Indian Pharmacopoeia.

reviews.review_heading: Good college. I would recommend this to everyone.
reviews.review_text: Boys' hostel is okay. The food is good. The infrastructure is okay too. Infrastructure is still under construction. There are projectors, white boards and big seminar halls, etc. It is a good college. I would recommend it. The ambiance is good too. And the view near is beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms are not quite good and library is small. The facility of hostel is quite poor food is also average in mess.
Medical facilities are average sports and games are played but playground condition is very bad. This'll very much for your chance.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers and hardworking staff members.
reviews.review_text: All labs are decent. Our college has a boys' hostel, and it is decent. The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel rooms are spacious at an affordable price. The food served in the hostel is great.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great teachers and ambiance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Hostel rooms are spacious at affordable prices. The food served in the hostel is great. Our college should construct a new auditorium. The canteen facility is better. Laboratory is good in our college. Boys' hostel is also available.

highlights.summary: Faculty of Physiotherapy, MAHER is an institute. Faculty of Physiotherapy, MAHER offers a total of 8 courses at UG and PG levels in 5 specialisations such as Cardiology, Neurology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Orthopaedics and Pediatrics. Furthermore, it offer courses such as BPT and MPT in Full Time mode. Faculty of Physiotherapy, MAHER fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 3,14,000 to 5,20,000. Faculty of Physiotherapy, MAHER has an annual seat intake of 135 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. As per the recent Faculty of Physiotherapy, MAHER placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 3,75,000. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.
